§ The Manifesto

A small school with unhurried intentions.

Three chapters
on our way of teaching
01
Heritage

Founded in 1980, taught with the same quiet conviction ever since.

Modern Academy began as a small stone building on the road to Rehmbal. Four decades on, the walls have grown wider — but the intent has not moved an inch. Children arrive here to play, to think out loud, and to become gently unafraid of the world.

02
Method

Playway roots. Modern tools. Proficient teachers.

Lessons here begin with curiosity, not correction. Our teachers pair century-old habits — reading aloud, working with hands, patient revision — with clean labs, spoken English drills, and steady digital fluency.

Playway
Pedagogy
Spoken
English
Daily practice
Science
Lab
Hands-on
Sports
Hall
Body & discipline
03
Promise

A safe, watched, happy place to grow up in.

CCTV surveillance across the campus, a faculty that knows every child by name, and parents who are never more than a call away. When your child walks through our gate, they are looked after in the way you would look after them yourself.

§ From the Principal
The Crest
The Principal
M.A.S.S · Rehmbal, Udhampur
“

A school is not a building. It is the sum of the hours we spend teaching a child how to see the world.

Every morning at Rehmbal begins with the same small ritual — a bell, a prayer, a roll call of familiar names. In those ten minutes I am reminded that our work here is not spectacular. It is patient. It repeats. And it is what — after forty-five years — has made this small academy the place it is.

We do not promise to make your child into anything in particular. We promise, instead, to be careful with them.

In service, since 1980
Modern Academy High School
